display_name: Softwarica College / TU / PU Curriculum Syllabi
description: Course outlines, module lists, and learning outcomes for BSc (Hons) Computing and related programmes offered at Softwarica College of IT and E-Commerce (affiliated with Coventry University), Tribhuvan University (TU), and Pokhara University (PU). Collected manually from official college websites and printed prospectuses.

organisations: Softwarica College of IT and E-Commerce, Kathmandu
source.license: Educational / public prospectus material; not redistributed in raw form

schema.text: string — extracted plain text of the module/course description

pii.notes: Module descriptions only; no student or staff names

known_limitations: Coverage limited to publicly available syllabi; internal lab notes not included
TU Engineering curriculum updated irregularly; may lag current delivery
bias_notes: Reflects the Nepali higher-education module structure which emphasises theory over practical projects
English-medium only; excludes any Nepali-language supplementary material
